microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service scheduling capabilities** that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first **proactive resilience testing capability**, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new standard for continuous validation.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as **bridge lead** for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring strict security and compliance.
Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, restructuring scheduling cycles to reduce planning time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Architected partner integration test strategies across cloud environments on **Azure and AWS**, validating system resilience and solution deployment for four Fortune 500 enterprise customers across distributed infrastructure.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows, conducting live solution demonstrations and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Influenced the product roadmap by facilitating 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and securing stakeholder alignment to add **intent-based YAML generation** as a prioritized capability.

Optimized data retrieval and solution discoverability by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% for internal engineering customers.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ service teams.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths.

Enabled leadership to **target automation gaps** and prioritize high-impact investments by engineering a Power BI dashboard tracking operational toil metrics and deployment health across 140+ teams in real time.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and aligning IT and Engineering on a phased deployment plan.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and accelerate resolution across cross-functional robotics teams.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release overhead across the robotics platform.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM workflow and standardized solution design process.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to improve lead quality and funnel efficiency.

Improved leadership **pricing models and margin visibility** by conducting financial profitability analysis across 1,000+ project records, identifying cost leakage patterns and recommending data-driven corrective actions.

tailoring_notes: Wove in 'solution deployment' and 'cloud environments (Azure and AWS)' directly from JD Requirements into microsoft_ft bullet#6, mirroring the IT/infrastructure context Esri specifies.
Used 'solution demonstrations' (JD: 'Present technical demonstrations of proposed solutions') in microsoft_2023 bullet#1 to frame the AI adoption work as pre-sales-style demo and training activity.
Incorporated 'go-to-market strategy' and 'solution design process' (JD: 'sales strategies', 'conceptual solution design') into pro_painters bullets#1 and #2 to surface business development alignment.
Mirrored JD phrase 'self-service' and 'scalable' deployment model in microsoft_ft bullet#2, echoing Esri's language around deployment and administration best practices.

Framed amazon_robotics bullet#1 around 'phased deployment plan' and IT/Engineering alignment to echo JD requirement: 'troubleshoot client issues related to Esri application deployment and system architecture.'
